title: Whispers in the Wind
author: Lina Rahman
description: A heartfelt story of love and loss carried through the whispers of time.

title: The Dark Frontier
author: Matthew Harffy
description: An in-depth look at the future of artificial intelligence and its global impact.

title: Cosmic Wonders
author: Sara Ahmed
description: Explore the mysteries of the universe, from black holes to distant galaxies.

title: Dance of Shadows
author: Gourav Mohanty
description: The Rakshasan Tree Cities have opened their borders for the first time in centuries, gathering kings, clerics, matriarchs and merchant lords to a Conclave of Peace... all the better to carve up the future without having to worry about either Empire or Republic.

title: Introduction to Cyber Security
author: Anand Shinde
description: A beginner-friendly introduction to cybersecurity in the digital age. The book takes a dip in history to talk about the very first computer virus, and at the same time, discusses in detail about the latest cyber threats.

title: Physics of the Plasma Universe
author: Anthony L. Peratt
description: This book covers topics such as the large-scale structure and the filamentary universe; the formation of magnetic fields and galaxies, active galactic nuclei and quasars, the origin and abundance of light elements, star formation and the evolution of solar systems.

title: The Lost Letters
author: Jillian Cantor
description: A touching narrative about rediscovered letters that change lives forever. A gorgeous and thrilling novel…

title: Robotics
author: Appin Knowledge Solutions
description: This up-to-date text and reference is designed to present the fundamental principles of robotics with a strong emphasis on engineering applications and industrial solutions based on robotic technology. It can be used by practicing engineers and scientists

title: Beyond Gravity
author: Justin Leiber
description: Understanding gravity and its role in shaping the universe. Uncertain whether he is a prisoner or guest, and forgetful of the accident from which he is now recovering

title: Timeless Echoes
author: Dr Maricela A. Kohan Vitale
description: There are echoes that do not fade. They move through generations, carried in breath and memory, whispering truth into the heart of those who pause long enough to listen.

title: Blockchain Basics
author: Daniel Drescher
description: This book bridges the gap that exists between purely technical books about the blockchain and purely business-focused books. It does so by explaining both the technical concepts that make up the blockchain and their role in business-relevant applications.

title: A New Science of Life
author: Rupert Sheldrake
description: Rupert Sheldrake sees these processes as examples of morphic resonance. Past forms and activities of organisms, he argues, influence organisms in the present through direct connections across time and space.
